tools.name: search_products
tools.title: Search products
tools.description: Search the product catalog by free text and optional category filter. Best first step when the user has not named a specific product.

query.description: Free-text search terms matched against product names and descriptions.

category.description: Restrict results to one catalog category.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

tools.name: get_product
tools.title: Get product details
tools.description: Fetch the full detail sheet for one product, including specs and stock. Only call this when the user asks about a specific product; search_products is cheaper for browsing.

product_id.description: Catalog identifier of the product, as returned by search_products.

tools.name: list_orders
tools.title: List orders
tools.description: Page through the customer's past orders, newest first, with status and totals for each.

limit.description: Maximum number of orders per page.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous response.

tools.name: get_order
tools.title: Get order
tools.description: Fetch one order with line items, shipping progress, and payment summary.

order_id.description: Identifier of the order, as returned by list_orders.

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.title: Cancel order
tools.description: Cancel an order that has not yet shipped and trigger a refund to the original payment method.

order_id.description: Identifier of the order to cancel.

reason.description: Customer-stated cancellation reason, recorded for support.

tools.name: get_account
tools.title: Get account
tools.description: Fetch the signed-in customer's profile: contact details, default address, and loyalty balance.
